remarks: Just beautiful! Welcome to 157 Newtown Turnpike, set on a meticulously landscaped acre-plus of property, this is the combination of easy single level living paired with a newly renovated lower level. This home features thoughtful updates and details throughout that are simply exciting. The welcoming foyer perfectly turns to the formal living room open to dining room - still maintaining their very cool mid-century vibe. Then the surprise comes- a great room/family room complete with soaring vaulted ceiling and wood-burning fireplace perfect for entertaining and cozy nights. Through french doors you'll find the delightful sunroom with vaulted ceilings & skylights with peaceful views in every direction.  The newly renovated lower level adds more than 700 square feet of finished living space- heated and a/c- including a media and lounge area with endless possibilities. An additional unfinished area provides ample room for a workshop, storage, or future expansion.  Outside, enjoy beautiful lawns, mature landscaping, privacy, and room to breathe. And the location? Quintessential Westport- minutes to the train, beach, shopping, dining, movies and more! Oh, did I mention- yes it's town water not well, yes it's DREAMY Westport low taxes and SoConn Natural Gas locator says nat gas available! This is the house you'll love coming home to. Come see it for yourself. Note: The listing agent is not the owner of this property however the homeowner (the seller) is a licensed agent.
